programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.sub-title: Long Distance DMs to Jacó Dreams
programme.desc: After a DM slide and just one week together, a Canadian is selling everything to relocate and reignite a romance in Jacó, Costa Rica. They're buying a home and working together, he's betting his life savings on a relationship that's yet to be tested.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A family in Ohio looks to live their best life and relocate to Hilton Head, South Carolina. They've got just one weekend to find a home, and he wants a fixer, but after a lifetime of living in construction zones, she's not giving up on something new.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After working abroad for several years in Australia, a young couple returns to buy a home in the Florida panhandle; they need plenty of room to start a family; he's willing to spend for high-end finishes, but she prefers something more affordable.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Young parents need a bigger place for their growing family in Chicago; she wants a historic home in the city, but he wants something newer and bigger in the suburbs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple has differing ideas as they look to buy their first house together in Knoxville, Tennessee. She wants the contemporary new-build she's always dreamed of, but he has his heart set on an older home in need of serious TLC.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A bachelor enlists his wingman and cousin to help find a waterfront home on the Caribbean island of Bonaire; he's an avid scuba diver and wants a place for entertaining, but his list of must-haves may be a challenge for his agent.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Three ugly New England homes contend for a chance at a $150,000 makeover by designer Alison Victoria! It's between a house where art has taken over the walls,a former church with a terrifying hole and a once-glamorous home with a homeowner in denial.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Comedian Retta travels across five different regions of the US to tour properties competing for the ugliest home around. After crowning the worst of the worst, HGTV designer Alison Victoria surprises the homeowners with a spectacular $150,000 renovation!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: The ugly journey comes to an end as Retta reveals the winner of "Ugliest House in America"; the winning house receives a $150,000 renovation from HGTV's Alison Victoria, transforming their once-ugly house into a once-in-a-lifetime dream home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: A farmhouse is transformed into a functional family home with an earthy design; Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin create a kitchen that is fit for a chef, a traditional New England family room and even a goat jungle gym for their new farm animals.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: Jon and Kristina tackle a very sweet renovation, when they take on baker Katrina Marino's charming 1910 house; Katrina is an empty nester who is looking to update her home to better fit her lifestyle and passions, particularly baking.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: Restoring a 1790s farmhouse with a design inspired by fairy-tale cottages of England; the team updates the kitchen with 200-year-old pine floorboards found in the attic, and gives the home a mudroom and a true English garden.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin take on a horse farmhouse; they bring the house out of the 1800s with a beautiful farmhouse kitchen, a dining room with a view and a home for the family's new piglet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: After living in a historic house with a plethora of problems, a family looks to spread out in a new place with no maintenance issues; Mika and Brian are tasked to create their new home with ample storage and custom features for each family member.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Although a couple wants to downsize, they still need a home big enough to host their large dance parties; with a unique design style in mind, Brian and Mika look to build them a cultural and sexy house that sweeps them off their feet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: After a couple's home is destroyed by a hurricane, their biggest challenge isn't rebuilding, the real disaster occurs with their battle over paint colors. And now, Brian and Mika are tasked with making sure that one of them doesn't get too blue.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Brian and Mika take on the task of building their first container home.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.sub-title: House Held Up by Car Jacks
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn buy a house that is so termite eaten they don't even need a hammer for demolition; more problems appear as they peel back the layers as they discover a deck being held up by a rope and a foundation that's on carjacks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn take on an ambitious project as they renovate a five-unit compound on Kalama Street; the rundown property needs a ton of work, and in Phase One of the renovation, they work to turn this filthy duplex into something truly special.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: In the second phase of their ambitious renovation, Kamohai and Tristyn tackle the remaining three units of their Kalama Street compound; they're hoping for a value high enough to keep the property in the family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: After a friend brings a deal in exchange for a 50/50 partnership, the Kalamas take on a 4,000-square-foot A-frame overlooking Pearl Harbor. But when surprise design upgrades are added mid-reno, finances and friendships are put to the test.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Complicated Search for the Simple Life in Costa Rica
programme.desc: After a one-time vacation, a young Canadian is ready to leave Montreal for simplicity in Costa Rica; she's looking for a more spiritual and nature-infused life, but realizing her big expectations in the small town of San Mateo may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: An Officer and a Princess in Lincoln, England
programme.desc: A military officer jumps at a career opportunity and relocates with his wife to Lincoln, England; they're looking for a place with plenty of room for visiting family; she's out of her comfort zone and has big expectations on their single income.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Trading Tumbleweeds for Big City Munich
programme.desc: Tired of the monotony in Arizona, an adventurous newlywed couple looks to trade tumbleweeds for a big city life in Munich; she speaks some German and has secured a job, but they still need to brace for the new experience, including married life.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Living Her Best Life in Ajijic, Mexico
programme.desc: Newly enabled to work remotely, a Canadian woman looks to escape the cold and head south to live her best life in Ajijic, Mexico.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Early Retirement Meets Reality in Siem Reap
programme.desc: Seasoned globetrotters who've made a career out of helping others retire early now look to retire themselves in Siem Reap, Cambodia; with financial goals as their priority, they may have to adjust their lofty expectations to find a place in their budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From Seattle Showers to Okinawa Shores
programme.desc: A couple leaves dreary Seattle for a lifelong dream to live on a beachy island in Okinawa, Japan. She wants to be close to the beach while he prefers something walkable near town, but on one income, finding what they both want may be a challenge.

programme.sub-title: Moms Know Best: Oxford and Edinburgh

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple's ranch-style home already holds many precious memories, but its layout, centered around a massive, unused fireplace, needs an overhaul; Jonathan and Drew improve the flow of the kitchen and main living areas.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the stunning Italian island of Sicily, a local guide takes a couple on a unique tour of the sizzling local traditions as they explore jaw-droppingly affordable and dreamy homes.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Greek island of Crete, a Tennessee woman travels 6000 miles in search of her forever home; with her bestie along, they discover the magic of local life, bargain homes, and the cheap cost of living.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Spanish coast just south of Barcelona, best friends from Texas look for an affordable dream home near Tarragona; with a local property expert, they tour through all the local culture and traditions the flavorful region has to offer.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: A Seattle couple's ready to take a bold leap and start a family in Spain. With a local property expert guiding the way, they tour breathtaking bargain homes near Granada and see stunning places far beyond what they could ever afford in the US.

programme.desc: After winning $5 million on a scratch ticket, two empty nesters are gifting their children with their dream forever home; David takes this generous couple on an adventure through New York's Hudson Valley.
